title: Wind's Spellbooks : Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks Addon
description: Add a brand new "Wind" school to irons spells n spellbooks
body:
Wind's Spellbooks introduces a brand new "Wind" school to irons spells n spellbooks


## Featuring:

- 7 new upgradable spells
- 1 new wizard armor set
- 1 new structure "windmill"
- 1 new spellcaster "aeromancer"
- 1 new staff & spellbook

![Discover the new wind school](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c32775e1dff756dc78bbe98f49236164d2cf829.png)
![Explore a new structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f079b3d71b71bce28b6d50586fd0c1e4886597a1.jpeg)
![Encounter the Aeromancer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dd7abf5be7c74aa6f369b22465018b076c3cf10.jpeg)
![Try powerful new spells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855d385f8ef0faf4687df4036b4b9f648cff2e5c.jpeg)
